issue.message: Flag not allowed here
Flag not allowed here
Flag not allowed here
Must be one of: OobData.LE_DEVICE_ROLE_PERIPHERAL_ONLY, OobData.LE_DEVICE_ROLE_CENTRAL_ONLY, OobData.LE_DEVICE_ROLE_BOTH_PREFER_PERIPHERAL, OobData.LE_DEVICE_ROLE_BOTH_PREFER_CENTRAL
Consider declaring this constant using 1 << 1 instead
Consider declaring this constant using 1 << 2 instead
Consider declaring this constant using 1 << 3 instead
Consider declaring this constant using 1 << 4 instead
Consider declaring this constant using 1 << 5 instead
Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `SOURCE_CODEC_TYPE_LC3`
Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `SOURCE_CODEC_TYPE_OPUS_HI_RES`

Method `BluetoothAdapter.disable` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]}.

Method `BluetoothAdapter.getProfileConnectionState` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothAdapter.closeProfileProxy` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `null.onBluetoothServiceUp` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothDevice.getBondState` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothDevice.fetchUuidsWithSdp` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]}.

Method `GattCallback.onClientRegistered` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `GattCallback.onCharacteristicRead` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `GattCallback.onCharacteristicWrite` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `GattCallback.onDescriptorRead` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].
issue.errorLine1: public void onDescriptorRead(BluetoothDevice device, int status, int handle, byte[] value) {

issue.message: Method `GattCallback.onDescriptorWrite` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothHapClient.BluetoothHapClient` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.registerSinkAppConfiguration` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.unregisterAppConfiguration` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.connectChannelToSource` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.disconnectChannel` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.getMainChannelFd` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.getConnectionState` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.getConnectedDevices` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothHealth.getDevicesMatchingConnectionStates` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothLeAudio.BluetoothLeAudio` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `BluetoothLeScanner.startScanFromSource` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN, android.permission.UPDATE_DEVICE_STATS]} but only calls APIs requiring {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]}.

Method `BluetoothLeScanner.startTruncatedScan` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BleScanCallbackWrapper.onScannerRegistered` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

issue.message: Method `BluetoothMap.getConnectionState` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothSap.getConnectionState` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothVolumeControl.finalize` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `BluetoothVolumeControl.onServiceConnected` is missing a @RequiresPermission annotation or it's too narrow. It calls APIs that require {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but is only annotated with [none].

Method `CallbackWrapper.registerCallback` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].

Method `CallbackWrapper.unregisterCallback` has a broader @RequiresPermission annotation than necessary. It is annotated with {allOf=[android.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, android.permission.BLUETOOTH_PRIVILEGED]} but only calls APIs requiring [none].
issue.errorLine1: public void unregisterCallback(@Nullable S service, @NonNull T callback) {
